app.name: Procraft
auth.modal.title: Create account
auth.modal.description: Create a Procraft account to perform this action and save your data.
auth.login.title: Welcome back
auth.login.subtitle: Sign in to your Procraft account.
auth.register.title: Create account
auth.register.subtitle: Create your Procraft workspace.
auth.register.subtitleTelegramCode: Get the confirmation code from the Telegram bot and enter it.
auth.register.usernameFormat: Only lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens or underscores.
auth.register.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.register.telegramBotHint: Open the bot and enter the 4-digit code sent to you.
auth.register.codeNotReceived: Registration code not received. Refresh and try again.
auth.resetPassword.title: Reset password
auth.resetPassword.subtitle: We'll send a confirmation code to your email.
auth.resetPassword.subtitleTelegramCode: Get the confirmation code from the Telegram bot and enter it.
auth.resetPassword.telegramBotHint: Open the bot and enter the 4-digit code sent to you.
auth.resetPassword.newPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.resetPassword.success: Password updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
dashboard.title: Your Procraft workspace
dashboard.subtitle: Track portfolio status, complete next steps, and manage your public page.
dashboard.nextStep.fillContent: Add skills, projects and social links
dashboard.nextStep.share: Share your public link or export to PDF
dashboard.publicLink.title: Public link
dashboard.publicLink.ready: Your page is ready. You can share the link.
dashboard.publicLink.notReady: Link will appear after profile is saved.
profile.title: Profile information
profile.subtitle: This information appears in your public profile and selected templates.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Brief and compelling information about your work experience.
profile.sectionsSubtitle: Enter additional information to complete your public profile.
profile.avatar.title: Profile photo
profile.avatar.subtitle: Image visible in public portfolio templates.
profile.avatar.subtitleDisabled: Save basic profile information before uploading a photo.
profile.section.saveFirst: Save basic profile information before adding sections.
profile.newCategory: Will be saved as a new category.
sections.skills.title: Skills
sections.skills.name: Skill name
sections.projects.title: Projects
sections.projects.name: Project name
sections.experiences.title: Work experience
sections.educations.title: Education
sections.certificates.title: Certificates
sections.certificates.name: Certificate name
sections.certificates.fileHint: File will be uploaded with certificate data when saved. PDF, JPG, JPEG, PNG or WEBP. Max size: {{size}}MB.
sections.certificates.fileTypeError: Certificate file must be PDF, JPG, JPEG, PNG or WEBP
sections.certificates.fileSizeError: Certificate file must be smaller than {{size}}MB
sections.socialLinks.title: Social links
templates.title: Templates
templates.subtitle: Choose how your public profile will look.
templates.minimal: Simple, clean and easy-to-read resume appearance.
templates.modern: Modern card view with blue and cyan highlights.
templates.classic: Formal, centered and classic professional appearance.
templates.editorial: Large typography and magazine-style premium portfolio.
templates.developer: Dark terminal, code editor and dashboard style developer portfolio.
analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Brief report on views and visits to your portfolio profile.
pdf.title: PDF export
pdf.subtitle: Download an ATS-friendly resume PDF based on your Procraft profile.
pdf.resumeDesc: Profile information, experience, education, skills, projects and certificates are compiled into a clean PDF file.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Account and public link information.
settings.account.title: Account
settings.account.usernameFormat: Only lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens or underscores
settings.account.notFoundDesc: Log in again to view settings.
settings.account.portfolioLinkNotReady: Will appear after profile is created
settings.interface.title: Interface
settings.help.title: Help
settings.help.desc: Video tutorials and news on the Procraft Telegram channel.
settings.danger.title: Delete account
settings.danger.desc: If the account is deleted, the login session will end and profile data cannot be recovered.
settings.danger.warningDesc: Type the text below exactly to continue.
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.subtitle: This page does not exist or has been deleted.
landing.hero.title: Build your professional portfolio
landing.hero.subtitle: Showcase your skills to the world with Procraft. Create a professional portfolio and resume in minutes.
landing.features.title: Why Procraft?
landing.features.portfolio.title: Personal portfolio
landing.features.portfolio.desc: Your own username.procraft.uz page — portfolio and resume together.
landing.features.templates.title: Beautiful templates
landing.features.templates.desc: Choose from Minimal, Modern, Classic, Editorial and Developer styles.
landing.features.pdf.title: PDF resume
landing.features.pdf.desc: Download a professional ATS-friendly PDF resume with one click.
landing.features.analytics.title: Analytics
landing.features.analytics.desc: Track who is viewing your portfolio page.
landing.cta.title: Start today
landing.cta.subtitle: Sign up and create your professional online portfolio.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Unable to connect to server. Check your internet connection.
errors.emailTaken: This email is already in use.
errors.usernameFormat: Username may only contain lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens or underscores.
errors.invalidCredentials: Email, username or password is incorrect.
errors.loginCodeInvalid: Code is invalid or has expired.
errors.loginCodeTooManyAttempts: Too many incorrect attempts. Please log in again.
errors.registerCodeInvalid: Registration code is invalid or has expired.
errors.registerCodeTooManyAttempts: Too many incorrect attempts. Please register again.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Email not confirmed. Please verify the code sent to your email.
errors.passwordResetCodeInvalid: Password reset code is invalid or has expired.
errors.passwordResetTooManyAttempts: Too many incorrect attempts. Please try again.
errors.notAuthenticated: Session not found. Please sign in again.
errors.csrf: Security token mismatch. Refresh the page and try again.
errors.validation: Please check the information you entered.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
